title: Junior Investment Banker at ICRA Advisory Limited

jsonLd.title: Junior Investment Banker at ICRA Advisory Limited
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Investment Banker with drive and ambition, ICRA Advisory Limited in Rajkot is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About ICRA Advisory Limited:
ICRA Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in MS Excel

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Flexible working hours
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Rajkot, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ICRA Advisory Limited!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
